case_id: Invoice discrepancy audit across 5 corrupted invoices

pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates this path by copying the source Chinook database
task.json description specifies this export location
task.json description requires SQL script to be saved to this location

Downloaded and queried pristine Chinook database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite. All 5 invoices exist. Query of pristine database confirmed no other invoices have discrepancies > 0.05, validating the completeness of this list.
Original Invoice 10 total in Chinook: 5.94. Stored total after corruption: 5.94 + 5.00 = 10.94. Calculated total (sum of line items): 5.94. Discrepancy = 10.94 - 5.94 = 5.0
Original Invoice 55 total in Chinook: 0.99. Stored total after corruption: 0.99 - 2.00 = -1.01. Calculated total: 0.99. Discrepancy = -1.01 - 0.99 = -2.0
Original Invoice 120 total in Chinook: 1.98. Stored total after corruption: 1.98 + 10.50 = 12.48. Calculated total: 1.98. Discrepancy = 12.48 - 1.98 = 10.5
Original Invoice 250 total in Chinook: 13.86. Stored total after corruption: 13.86 + 0.99 = 14.85. Calculated total: 13.86. Discrepancy = 14.85 - 13.86 = 0.99
Original Invoice 310 total in Chinook: 7.96. Stored total after corruption: 7.96 - 100.00 = -92.04. Calculated total: 7.96. Discrepancy = -92.04 - 7.96 = -100.0

pi_items.metadata_value: Chinook sample database (real data based on iTunes library)
pi_items.verified_value: Real Chinook database. Media data created from actual iTunes Library. Customer/employee data manually created with fictitious names and verified addresses. Sales data auto-generated for 4-year period. Originally created by Luis Rocha, hosted at https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database
pi_items.source: Web search results and GitHub repository README. setup_dbeaver.sh downloads from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database/raw/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite

pi_items.verified_value: Exactly 5 invoices (IDs: 10, 55, 120, 250, 310) have absolute discrepancies > 0.05 after corruption injection
pi_items.source: Queried pristine Chinook database with SQL HAVING clause to find all invoices with ABS(StoredTotal - CalculatedTotal) > 0.05. Result: 0 invoices in pristine state. After corruption injection per setup_task.sh, exactly 5 invoices exceed threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is real, based on actual iTunes library data. Five specific invoices (IDs 10, 55, 120, 250, 310) are corrupted by setup_task.sh through offset injection to their Total field. Discrepancies are: Invoice 10 = 5.0, Invoice 55 = -2.0, Invoice 120 = 10.5, Invoice 250 = 0.99, Invoice 310 = -100.0. These are the only invoices in the database with absolute discrepancy > 0.05. All metadata paths are correctly specified. Expected CSV output: /home/ga/Documents/exports/invoice_discrepancies.csv with columns InvoiceId, InvoiceDate, StoredTotal, CalculatedTotal, Discrepancy. Expected SQL script: /home/ga/Documents/scripts/audit_query.sql.
